properties.name: subcategories
properties.value: {% for item in selector:.leftside .spaceit_pad %}{% set infos = item|split:\":\" %}{% set category = infos|first %}{% if category == \"Type\" %}{{infos|last|trim|wikilink}}{% endif %}{% endfor %}

properties.name: releaseStatus
properties.value: {% for item in selector:.leftside .spaceit_pad %}{% set infos = item|split:\":\" %}{% set category = infos|first %}{% if category == \"Status\" %}{{infos|last}}{% endif %}{% endfor %}

properties.name: year
properties.value: {% for item in selector:.leftside .spaceit_pad %}{% set infos = item|split:\":\" %}{% set category = infos|first %}{% if category == \"Published\" %}{{infos|last|replace:\"/^.*?(\\d{4}).*$/\":\"$1\"}}{% endif %}{% endfor %}

properties.name: synonyms
properties.value: {% for item in selector:.leftside .spaceit_pad %}{% set infos = item|split:\":\" %}{% set category = infos|first %}{% if category == \"Synonyms\" %}{{infos|last|trim}}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
